title: ADN-260 After The Party, I Missed My Last Train Home, So My Lady Boss And I Went To A Love Hotel And Spent The Night There... Nami Hoshino After The Party, I Missed My Last Train Home, So My Lady Boss And I Went To A Love Hotel And Spent The Night There..
description: [Nami Hoshino, completely retired work] At the end of work, my boss Shino invited me to drink. He is a longing boss who cares for me who is hired mid-career and is not accustomed to work yet. "No ... I drank too much ... I want to lie down somewhere ..." I couldn't leave Shino-san, who was drunk, as it was ... We headed to the nearest hotel, but that was a love hotel. Adult men and women alone at a love hotel ... mistakes were inevitable.
